## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the topic and logistics for the upcoming Strapi\<\>GrowthX AI-powered SEO Webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webinar topic: "How to Automate Your Website Management with AI" (with "Put Your Website on Autopilot" as a potential subtitle)](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Event date: October 29, 2024, at 9 AM Pacific, 1-hour duration](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Marcel to create Luma event page, Zoom webinar, and promotional materials](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Golzar to handle email promotion via HubSpot, scheduled for October 22](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for October 25 to finalize details and run through](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Topic Selection

  - [Focused on managing website as the central piece, expanding beyond just SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Selected "How to Automate Your Website Management with AI" as the main title](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - ["Put Your Website on Autopilot" suggested as an engaging subtitle](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Emphasis on time-saving workflows and automation using Strapi and AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Event Logistics

  - [Date: October 29, 2024, at 9 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Duration: 1 hour (including Q\&A)](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Platform: Zoom Webinar via Luma](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Speakers: Marcel, Paul, and Eoin (Golzar to manage behind the scenes)](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

### Promotional Strategy

  - [Marcel to create cover image, draft description, and set up Luma page](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Golzar to send promotional email via HubSpot on October 22 (one week before event)](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Suggestion to use personalized URL parameters for higher conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Sequential promotion plan: personal networks first, then brand channels](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)

### Content and Demonstrations

  - [Marcel has 15 hours of workshop content to draw from](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Paul to showcase use case of updating meta descriptions automatically](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Eoin to provide CMS management workflows from clients](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Potential demo: Paul's personal project converting YouTube videos to blog posts automatically](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [Need for a Strapi-powered website instance for live demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Exploration of cost-effective transcription methods (YouTube scraping vs. DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/Ms9zrFDD--XxzXJTySzJrsRzQgJUFfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
